card.name: Pendant of Bright Futures
card.text: When this artifact enters, you may search your library for a basic land or Oasis card, reveal it and put it into your hand, then shuffle. {T}: Add {C}. You gain 1 life.

card.name: Votive Soul
card.text: When this creature dies, create a 1/1 white Bird creature token with flying.

card.name: Two Suns Fighter
card.text: During your turn, this creature has first strike. When this creature dies, you gain 2 life.

card.name: Priest of the Angel's Path
card.text: {1}{W}, {T}: Tap target creature.

card.name: Envoy of New Ways
card.text: Lifelink Whenever you play a land, if that land has a different name than each other land you control, target creature you control gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Conflicted Angel
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, tap target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: Coordinated Infantry
card.text: Vigilance Whenever this creature attacks with one or more other Warriors, it gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Cruel Adjudicator
card.text: Betray (When this permanent enters, you may sacrifice another permanent that shares a color with it.) Flying When this creature betrays another permanent, put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target artifact or creature. Then if the betrayed permanent was a creature, you draw a card.

card.name: Phalanx Commander
card.text: When this creature enters, creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Broken Lands Monitor
card.text: Flying Whenever one or more creatures an opponent controls becomes tapped, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Blessed Revivalist
card.text: Betray (When this permanent enters, you may sacrifice another permanent that shares a color with it.) When this creature betrays a permanent, return up to one artifact, creature or enchantment card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Mindless Servant
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, tap it unless there are four or more different names among lands you control.

card.name: Swift Response
card.text: Destroy target tapped creature.

card.name: Deity's Presence
card.text: When this enchantment enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until this enchantment leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Ready Bows
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+2 and gains reach until end of turn. Untap it.

card.name: Room // Breathe
card.text:
Target permanent gains indestructible until end of turn
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Destroy target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: Feeding Time
card.text: Create three 1/1 white and black Cat creature tokens. Scry 1.

card.name: Maathep's Interdiction
card.text: Exile target tapped nonland permanent. Its controller creates a tapped Treasure token.

card.name: Hazoret's Blessing
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has lifelink. {2}: Enchanted creature gains first strike until end of turn. When this Aura is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, scry 2.

card.name: Last Dignity
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a nonland permanent. Create a 4/4 white Angel creature token with flying.

card.name: Soul Administrator
card.text: When this creature enters or dies, you may draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Aven Theorist
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature deals combat damage to an opponent, the next instant or sorcery spell you cast this turn costs {2} less to cast.

card.name: Dedicated Scribe
card.text: Vigilance Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a planeswalker or player, you draw a card.

card.name: Seshen Pollinators
card.text: Flying {1}{U}: Move a counter from target permanent to another target permanent. Activate only once each turn, and only as a sorcery.

card.name: Zenith Hunter
card.text: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, target creature you control gets +1/+1 and gains flying until end of turn. This ability triggers no more than twice each turn.

card.name: Frozen Sands Cadre
card.text: Ward {1} Whenever a Zombie you control deals combat damage to a planeswalker or player, you may scry 1.

card.name: Vindictive Sphinx
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, you may pay {1}. When you do, return target tapped creature you don't control to its owner's hand.

card.name: Avatar of Sab-Sunen
card.text: This creature enters with two +1/+1 counters on it. Remove a counter from this creature: Choose one. Activate only once each turn. — • Target creature gains flying until end of turn. • Untap target creature.

card.name: Nose // The Grindstone
card.text:
Target creature you control gains hexproof until end of turn.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Any number of target players each mill 3 cards.

card.name: Nullification Chant
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast as long as you control a creature with one or more counters on it. Counter target spell.

card.name: Listen // Your Heart
card.text:
Draw two cards, then discard a card.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Tap or untap target creature. Scry 2.

card.name: Meditative Wisdom
card.text: Draw three cards, then discard a card.

card.name: Turned to Stone
card.text: Enchant creature When this Aura enters, tap enchanted creature. At the beginning of its controller's upkeep step, tap enchanted creature. Enchanted creature has no abilities while tapped.

card.name: Second // None
card.text:
Target creature's controller puts it on their choice of the top or bottom of its owner's library.
---
Aftermath Target creature's controller puts it on their choice of the top or bottom of its owner's library.

card.name: Tough // Avoid
card.text:
Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. If it wasn't a creature, draw a card.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Target creature can't be blocked until end of turn.

card.name: Sailskiff
card.text: When this artifact enters or leaves the battlefield, scry 2, then target creature you control gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Note // Self
card.text:
Target creature you control gets +X/+X until end of turn, where X is the number of cards you've drawn this turn.
---
Aftermath Create a 2/2 blue and black Zombie Bird creature token with flying.

card.name: Unsorted Scrolls
card.text: Sacrifice this artifact: Surveil 2. When this artifact leaves the battlefield, you may pay {1}{U}. When you do, return target instant or sorcery from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: The Wisdom of Unity
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell, scry 1. Once per turn, if that spell is multicolored, you may draw a card instead.

card.name: Serrated Scorpion
card.text: When this creature dies, it deals 2 damage to each opponent and you gain 2 life.

card.name: Fleshform Serket
card.text: Deathtouch Pay 3 life: Untap this creature. Activate only once each turn, and only as a sorcery.

card.name: Sentimental Thug
card.text: Menace When this creature enters, if an opponent lost life this turn, you may surveil 2.

card.name: Canopic Harvester
card.text: Betray (When this permanent enters, you may sacrifice another permanent that shares a color with it.) When this creature betrays another permanent, target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card with mana value 3 or less from it. That player discards that card.

card.name: Carcass Collector
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, you may sacrifice another creature you control or exile a creature card from your graveyard. When you do, create a 1/1 black Zombie creature token.

card.name: Ferocious Cobra
card.text: {R}: This creature gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Ifnir Farseer
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, create an artifact Talisman token that's all colors with "When this artifact is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, you scry 1."

card.name: Returned Master
card.text: When this creature enters, you draw a card and lose 1 life. {2}{U}: Exile target Zombie you control, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control.

card.name: Burial Chamber Guardian
card.text: Defender, menace {1}{B}: This creature loses defender and gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Remains // Be Seen
card.text:
Create a 3/3 black Zombie Lizard creature token.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Destroy target creature or planeswalker with mana value 2 or less.

card.name: Mantle of Shards
card.text: Target creature you control gains deathtouch and indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Selling Lives
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Draw two cards.

card.name: Moment of Weakness
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if an opponent lost life this turn. Target opponent discards two cards.

card.name: Disintegrating Wrappings
card.text: You may cast this spell as though it had flash if you pay {1} more to cast it. Exile target creature.

card.name: Spinal Diviner
card.text: When this artifact enters or leaves the battlefield, choose one — • Target opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. • You draw a card and lose 2 life.

card.name: Betrayal of Secrets
card.text: Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card. If you sacrificed a permanent this turn, you gain 2 life.

card.name: Scarab Armor
Word // The Wise
card.text:
Any opponent may pay 4 life or sacrifice a nontoken creature. If no opponent does, you draw two cards.
---
Aftermath Create a 1/1 black and white Cat creature token.

card.name: Rage-Cursed Returned
card.text: Haste When this creature dies, it deals 1 damage to any noncreature target.

card.name: Frontier Messenger
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Maahestet Champion
card.text: When this creature attacks, if it shares a creature type with another attacking creature, it gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Shadowseller
card.text: Haste Pay 2 life: Copy target activated ability of a source you control. Activate only once each turn, and only during your turn.

card.name: Bloodsand Lich
card.text: This creature enters with an additional +1/+1 counter on it as long as an opponent lost life this turn.

card.name: Role Model Sergeant
card.text: {2}: Target Warrior gains first strike until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Ka-Blade Champion
card.text: Trample {1}{R}: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. Activate only once each turn as a sorcery, and only if this creature attacked this turn

card.name: Avenging Minotaur
card.text: Reach When this creature enters, you may pay {1}. When you do, return target instant and/or sorcery from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Starving Sandwurm
card.text: Trample

card.name: Pay // Play
card.text:
This spell deals 2 damage to any target.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Discard a card, then draw two cards.

card.name: Stirred // Action
card.text:
Target creature gets +1/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control.

card.name: Stealing the Beacon
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast as long as you've activated an ability of a nonland card this turn. Exile the top two cards of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play those cards.

card.name: Abrade
card.text: Choose one — • Abrade deals 3 damage to target creature. • Destroy target artifact.

card.name: Hot // Trot
card.text:
This spell deals 4 damage to target permanent.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Create a 3/3 red Elemental Cat creature with haste.

card.name: Holy Pyre
card.text: This spell deals 5 damage to any target. Then if there are two or more colors among Warriors you control, you gain 3 life.

card.name: Helm of Hazoret
card.text: When this artifact enters or leaves the battlefield, it deals 1 damage to each opponent, then you surveil 1.

card.name: Read the Forbidden Scrolls
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast if an opponent lost life this turn. Discard two cards, then draw three cards.

card.name: Time // Shine
card.text:
This spell deals damage to target opponent equal to the number of cards in their hand plus 1.
---
Aftermath Until your next turn, whenever an opponent casts a spell, you may copy that spell. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Bite // Eat
card.text:
Until end of turn, target creature you control gains "{1}, {T}: This creature deals damage equal to its power to any target."
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Double target creature's power until end of turn.

card.name: Apepisw Gate
card.text: Defender At the beginning of your end step, if a player sacrificed a permanent this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature you control.

card.name: Oashra Vitalist
card.text: {1}, {T}: Add two mana in any combination of colors.

card.name: Exploring Couple
card.text: When this creature enters, you may search your library for a basic land card, reveal it and put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Giant Ibis
card.text: This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter and a reach counter on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, you may move a +1/+1 counter from this creature onto another target creature you control.

card.name: Instructor Huntress
card.text: {2}{RG}: Target creature you control gets +2/+0 until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Boat-climber Cobra
card.text: Deathtouch This creature assigns combat damage to planeswalkers and players equal to its toughness rather than its power.

card.name: Seeker of Lost Species
card.text: {T}: Add two mana of any one color. {2}{G}{W}: Return target land card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only once each turn as a sorcery.

card.name: Hippo Family
card.text: When this creature enters, if one or more counters were removed or put on a creature you control this turn, choose one — • Exile up to three cards from target player's graveyard. • Gain 2 life and scry 1.

card.name: Avenging Elephant
card.text: Trample {3}: Destroy target noncreature, nonbasic permanent. Activate only if this creature dealt combat damage to a planeswalker or player this turn.

card.name: Oasis Sentinel
card.text: This creature gets +X/+X and can't be blocked by creatures with power X or less, where X is the number of Oasis lands you control.

card.name: Maul
card.text: Target creature you control gets +1/+0 until end of turn. It fights up to one target creature you don't control.

card.name: Hunting Party
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact or enchantment with mana value 5 or less. • Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: City's Founding
card.text: Search your library for a basic land or Oasis card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Twilight Market
card.text: Look at the top X cards of your library, where X is the greatest toughness among creatures you control. You may reveal any number of creature and/or land cards from among them and put the revealed cards into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Ghrin-Danu's Servitors
card.text: Create three 1/1 Elemental creature tokens that are all colors.

card.name: Cover-Up
card.text: Destroy target nonbasic permanent. Its controller may search their library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Close // Home
card.text:
Target creature gets +2/+2 and gains trample until end of turn.
---
Aftermath Permanents you control gain indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Stumble Upon Sanctuary
card.text: Search your library for a land card and a basic land card and reveal them. Put the basic land card onto the battlefield, then put the other land card into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Scion of Hazoret
card.text: The first time each turn you or a permanent you control becomes the target of a spell or ability, Warriors you control get +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Herald of the Lost
card.text: Whenever this creature deals combat damage to an opponent or planeswalker, return up to one target permanent card with mana value 0 from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Arena Champion
card.text: Flying The first time during each of your turns you tap an untapped creature an opponent controls, you may have target creature you control get +X/+X until end of turn, where X is the power of the tapped creature.

card.name: Priestess of Sanctity
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 Elemental creature token that's all colors. Whenever a player sacrifices a colored permanent, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Vessel of Purity
card.text: Vigilance Schism — {T}, Tap one or more other creatures you control, sacrifice this creature: Search your library for a God card, reveal it and put it into your hand, then shuffle. If three or more other creatures were tapped this way, you may put that God onto the battlefield instead.

card.name: Callous Charioteer
card.text: Reach Betray (When this permanent enters, you may sacrifice another permanent that shares a color with it.) When this creature betrays a permanent, put a vigilance counter and a trample counter on it.

card.name: Razemaster
card.text: Betray (When this permanent enters, you may sacrifice another permanent that shares a color with it.) When this creature betrays a permanent, destroy all artifacts and enchantments with mana value equal to or less than that of the betrayed permanent.

card.name: Angel of Obeisance
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature you don't control that was tapped this turn. Flying, vigilance

card.name: Makheru, Voice of Truth
card.text: Flash Flying When Makheru enters, put a +1/+1 counter on each other creature you control, then if he was cast, permanents you control gain indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Megalithic Guardian
card.text: Vigilance Lands you control and untapped creatures you control have indestructible as long as there are four or more different names among lands you control.

card.name: Drakerider Spellweaver
card.text: Flying Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, surveil 1. If this is the second time this ability has resolved this turn, you may instead draw a card.

card.name: Keeper of Blessed Waters
card.text: {1}: Move a counter from one creature you control to another creature you control, then untap one of those creatures. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Afu, Chosen of the Scarab
card.text: Flying Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, create a 1/1 black Zombie creature token.

card.name: Vigilant Obstructionist
card.text: Vigilance Whenever an opponent draws one or more cards, if it's not the first they've drawn during their draw step, that opponent taps an untapped nonland permanent they control.

card.name: Vessel of Genius
card.text: Flying, ward {1} Schism — {T}, Tap one or more other creatures you control, sacrifice this creature: Search your library for a God card, reveal it and put it into your hand, then shuffle. If three or more other creatures were tapped this way, you may put that God onto the battlefield instead.

card.name: Pillar-Leaper Sphinx
card.text: Flash Flying When this creature enters, choose one — • Search your library for an instant or sorcery card, put it into your graveyard, then shuffle. • Draw a card.

card.name: Track Guardian
card.text: Reach This creature enters with two +1/+1 counters on it. {2}: Target creature you control must be blocked this turn if able. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Yours // Keep
card.text:
Counter target spell with mana value 2 or less.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Gain control of target nonland, noncreature permanent with mana value 2 or less.

card.name: Lofty Response
card.text: Untap each creature you control. Those creatures gain flying and hexproof until end of turn.

card.name: Mastery of Tumbling Sands
card.text: {1}{U}: Counter target activated or triggered ability of a nonland permanent. Tap that permanent. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Ceaseless Fighters
card.text: This creature enters tapped. At the beginning of your end step, if this card is in your graveyard and an opponent lost life this turn, you may pay {1}{B}. When you do, return this card to the battlefield.

card.name: Scion of Emptiness
card.text: Defender, menace {G} or Sacrifice a creature: Until end of turn, this creature can attack as though it didn't have defender. Whenever this creature deals combat damage to an opponent, that player discards two cards unless they pay life equal to this creature's toughness.

card.name: Obssessed Falconer
card.text: Betray (When this permanent enters, you may sacrifice another permanent that shares a color with it.) When this creature betrays another permanent, create a 1/1 white Bird creature token with flying, then put a +1/+1 counter on that token.

card.name: Vessel of Darkness
card.text: Menace Schism — {T}, Tap one or more other creatures you control, sacrifice this creature: Search your library for a God card, reveal it and put it into your hand, then shuffle. If three or more other creatures were tapped this way, you may put that God onto the battlefield instead.

card.name: Omnivorous Exhumer
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, it gains flying until end of turn. Whenever another creature dies, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Merciless Brawler
card.text: Menace, deathtouch When this creature dies, each opponent loses life equal to its toughness.

card.name: Rise of the Doomed
card.text: Zombies you control have menace. {2}{B}, Exile a nonland card from your graveyard: Create a 1/1 black Zombie creature token. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Localized Disaster
card.text: Each opponent loses 2 life. Creatures you don't control get -1/-1 until end of turn.

card.name: Hyena Pack Attack
card.text: Choose one. If you control a creature with toughness greater than its power, you may choose any number — • Target creature gets +1/+1 and gains lifelink until end of turn. • Target creature gets -1/-1 until end of turn.

card.name: Taw-honed Fighter
card.text: This creature enters with an additional +1/+1 counter on it as long as you've attacked this turn. When this creature enters, scry 1.

card.name: Skeshed, Dancing Storm
card.text: Haste Ward—Pay 2 life. Spells you cast can't be countered as long as an opponent lost life this turn.

card.name: Hermit Champion
card.text: {R}: This creature gains haste until end of turn. {G}: This creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Vessel of Wrath
card.text: Haste Schism — {T}, Tap one or more other creatures you control, sacrifice this creature: Search your library for a God card, reveal it and put it into your hand, then shuffle. If three or more other creatures were tapped this way, you may put that God onto the battlefield instead.

card.name: Scorchtrack Mehu
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each instant and/or sorcery spell you've cast this turn. Trample

card.name: Wine Priestess
card.text: Ward—Pay 2 life Haste When this creature enters, if you cast it, create three 1/1 red Human Warrior creature tokens with first strike. {T}: Target creature gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Corrupted Emberhorn
card.text: Menace When this creature enters, it deals 2 damage to each player and each other permanent.

card.name: Darkstorm Bolt
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast as long as you've cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand this turn. This spell deals 3 damage to any target.

card.name: Infectious Bravado
card.text: Enchant creature Whenever another Warrior you control enters, creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn. At the beginning of combat on your turn, create a 1/1 red Warrior creature token with haste. Sacrifice that token at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Eager // Please
card.text:
Target creature gets +2/+2 and gains haste until end of turn.
---
Aftermath Damage can't be prevented this turn. Players can't gain life this turn. If a creature would die this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: Eneri, Cunning Treasurer
card.text: {X}, {T}: Put X charge counters on this creature. {T}, Remove X charge counters from this creature: Add one mana of any color for each counter removed this way.

card.name: Luxa Shoremage
card.text: When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on it and another target creature you control. Whenever you attack with one or more creatures with counters on them, you may untap up to that many lands you control.

card.name: Giant Carrion Beetle
card.text: Defender {BG}: Exile target card from a graveyard. If that card is a creature card, this creature gets +1/+1 and loses defender until end of turn.

card.name: Paladin of Ghrin-Danu
card.text: Trample As long as there are four or more different names among lands you control, this creature gets +1/+1 and has ward {2} and vigilance.

card.name: Delta Monitor
card.text: Trample This creature enters with five +1/+1 counters on it. If this creature would be dealt damage, instead prevent that damage and remove a counter from it.

card.name: Vessel of Nature
card.text: At the beginning of your first main phase, add {G}. Schism — {T}, Tap one or more other creatures you control, sacrifice this creature: Search your library for a God card, reveal it and put it into your hand, then shuffle. If three or more other creatures were tapped this way, you may put that God onto the battlefield instead.

card.name: Naga Secretstealer
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, target creature you control gains deathtouch until end of turn. Whenever a creature you control with toughness greater than its power deals combat damage to an opponent or planeswalker, you draw a card.

card.name: Danurian Woodcaller
card.text: Trample At the beginning of your upkeep, if there are four or more different names among lands you control, you may have target land you control become a 6/6 green Elemental creature with trample in addition to its other types until end of turn.

card.name: Gargantuan Abytira
card.text: As long as you've activated an ability of a creature you control this turn, this spell can't be countered and may be cast as though it had flash. Trample, vigilance

card.name: Supervisor's Intervention
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target permanent you control. Permanents you control with counters on them gain hexproof until end of turn.

card.name: Sek'new, Lifeblood Brawler
card.text: Warriors you control have lifelink.

card.name: Converted Seraph
card.text: Flying, vigilance Betray (When this permanent enters, you may sacrifice another permanent that shares a color with it.) When this creature betrays a permanent, destroy target tapped creature. If it betrays an Angel or a legendary creature, you may instead destroy all tapped creatures.

card.name: Returned Vizier
card.text: Flash First strike Betray (When this permanent enters, you may sacrifice another permanent that shares a color with it.) When this creature betrays a permanent, you gain 4 life.

card.name: Basri Ket, Conflicted
Diplomatic Conclave
card.text: At the beginning of each opponent's upkeep, they may tap an untapped creature they control. If they don't, you draw a card. {W}, Sacrifice this enchantment: Exile target tapped creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Extracted Confession
card.text: Search your library for a permanent card with mana value X, where X is the total combat damage dealt to target opponent this turn, reveal it and put it into your hand, then shuffle. X can't be 0.

card.name: Carven Legacy
card.text: Whenever you sacrifice a nontoken, nonland permanent, you may return that card to the battlefield tapped under your control. It's a colorless land with "{T}: Add {C}," and it loses all other card types and abilities.

card.name: Snehemite Novitiate
card.text: Ward {1} {1}{UR}, {T}: Copy target noncreature spell that was cast from a graveyard. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Ramunap Revenant
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature attacks, other Zombies you control gain flying until end of turn.

card.name: Interdiction Angel
card.text: Flash This spell can't be countered. Flying When this creature enters, tap up to one target creature.

card.name: Mystic Manipulation
card.text: This spell costs {3} less to cast as long as you control all of its targets. Choose one— • Attach X target Auras and/or Equipment attached to a creature to another target creature. • Move X counters from target creature to another target creature.

card.name: Shifting Constellations
card.text: {WU}, Tap an untapped creature you control: Target opponent taps an untapped creature they control. Put a star counter on this enchantment. Activate only once each turn. Remove three star counters from this enchantment: Take an extra turn after this one. Exile this enchantment.

card.name: Djamankh's Hydromancy
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each counter on a creature you control. Look at the top X cards of your library, put one of them into your hand, then put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Enough // Go Around
card.text:
Reveal the top six cards of your library. An opponent separates those cards into two piles. Put one pile into your hand and the other into your graveyard.
---
Aftermath Exchange control of two target nonland permanents.

card.name: Bx'sur, Chosen of Darux
card.text: Menace When Bx'sur enters, you may pay {1}{B}. If you do, each player loses 1 life and she gains haste until end of turn. {BR}: Bx'sur gets +1/+1 until end of turn. Activate only if an opponent lost life this turn.

card.name: Eternal Embalmer
card.text: Betray (When this permanent enters, you may sacrifice another permanent that shares a color with it.) When this creature betrays another permanent, create a 1/1 black Zombie creature token. {B}, {T}, Sacrifice a Zombie: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Soulmaster Seter
card.text: Whenever a player sacrifices a permanent, you lose 1 life and put a +1/+1 counter on Seter. Then if that permanent was a nontoken creature, you draw a card. {2}{B}, Sacrifice another permanent: Seter gains menace and lifelink until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Isift, Vizier of Ifnir
card.text: Flying Whenever Isift enters or attacks, you mill a card, then each opponent mills two cards. {B}, Exile a creature card from your graveyard: You draw a card and lose 1 life. Activate only once each turn as a sorcery.

card.name: Isift's Judgment
card.text: Each creature gets -X/-X until end of turn, where X is the greatest number of cards put into a player's graveyard from anywhere this turn.

card.name: Wasmawt's Blessing
card.text: Enchant creature When enchanted creature dies, you draw X cards and lose X life, where X is its toughness. Then create a 1/1 black and green Snake creature token.

card.name: Kharteran Pike-Captain
card.text: Haste At the beginning of combat on your turn, this creature gains your choice of first strike, menace or trample until end of turn. Whenever this creature deals combat damage to an opponent this turn, you may pay {1}. If you do, put a counter of that kind on another creature you control.

card.name: Ewrkhy, Defender of Nature
card.text: Haste {1}{R}{G}: Create a 1/1 red Warrior creature token.

card.name: Lazotep Dragon
card.text: Flying, haste Betray (When this permanent enters, you may sacrifice another permanent that shares a color with it.) When this creature betrays another permanent, it deals 2 damage to any target. If a multicolor permanent was betrayed this way, surveil 2.

card.name: Allure of the Victorious
card.text: Untap each creature you don't control with mana value X or less, where X is the most life lost by an opponent this turn, and gain control of them until end of turn. Those creatures gain haste until end of turn. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase.

card.name: Righteous Passion
card.text: When this enchantment enters, and at the beginning of your upkeep, choose one — • put a Coward creature type counter on target creature you don't control. • Put a +1/+1 counter on target Warrior you control. Cowards can't block Warriors.

card.name: Agree // Disagree
card.text:
Create a token that's a copy of target creature you control, except it has haste and "At the beginning of the end step, sacrifice this token."
---
Aftermath This spell deals 3 damage to target permanent.

card.name: Ka-channel Wrapping
card.text: Whenever an ability of equipped creature is activated, you may copy that ability. You may choose new targets for the copy. This ability triggers only once each turn. Equip {1}

card.name: Hesep Tender
card.text: {T}: Untap target land and put a Paradise counter on it. As long as that land has a Paradise counter on it, it's a colorless Oasis land with "{T}: Add one mana of any color and you gain 1 life." It loses all other abilities and land subtypes.

card.name: Tankht, Gah-Api's Emissary
card.text: Trample Whenever you activate an ability of a creature you control, each other creature you control gets +1/+1 until end of turn. {R}: Tankht gains haste until end of turn. Activate only once each turn, and only as a sorcery.

card.name: Lifeblood Siphoner
card.text: Deathtouch Betray (When this permanent enters, you may sacrifice another permanent that shares a color with it.) When this creature betrays a creature, you may put a creature card with mana value 3 or less from your hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: Hyena Matriarch
card.text: This spell can't be countered as long as you control a creature with two or more counters on it. Trample, vigilance Whenever this creature enters or attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Home // Stay
card.text:
Create a 0/4 green Plant Wall creature token with defender and "{T}: Add one mana of any color."
---
Aftermath Until end of turn, target creature you control can attack as though it didn't have defender, and assigns combat damage equal to its toughness rather than its power.

card.name: Domesticate
card.text: Search your library for a creature card with mana value equal to or less than the number of different names among lands you control and put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Godsize
card.text: Triple target creature's power and toughness until end of turn. That creature gains trample until end of turn. At the beginning of your upkeep, you may pay {2}{R} and reveal this card from your hand. When you do, target creature you control gets +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Tekhen, Ancient Spiresoul
card.text: Flying Lands you control are Treasure artifacts in addition to their other types and have "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color." Whenever a Treasure enters under your control, if you don't control another Treasure with the same name, draw a card.

card.name: Two Suns' Radiance
card.text: Betray (When this permanent enters, you may sacrifice another permanent that shares a color with it.) When this enchantment betrays another permanent, you draw a card. If that permanent isn't a creature, you may instead create a token copy of this enchantment, except it doesn't have betray. If damage would be dealt to a permanent you control, prevent 1 of that damage.

card.name: Eager // Please
card.text:
Put a flying counter on target creature you control, then put a vigilance counter on each creature you control.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Draw a card for each permanent you control with a counter on it.

card.name: Neputarkh, the Heretic
card.text: Betray When this creature betrays another permanent, you draw a card, then discard a card. If the betrayed permanent was a Zombie, instead draw two cards then discard a card. {1}{U}{B}, Exile a Zombie creature card from your graveyard: Create a token that's a copy of that card, except it's a 1/1 colorless Spirit with flying.

card.name: Method // The Madness
card.text:
Each player mills four cards. You may cast a card milled this way by paying life equal to its mana value rather than its mana cost.
---
Aftermath Target opponent discards three cards. That player loses 1 life for each land card discarded this way.

card.name: Archangel of Ketramose
card.text: Flying Ward—Pay 2 life. Whenever another creature dies, you may choose one — • Exile that card. • Return that creature to the battlefield under your control with a finality counter on it. You lose 3 life.

card.name: Itching // Go
card.text:
Any number of target players discards their hand and draws seven cards.
---
Aftermath Creatures you control gain haste and first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Kav'set the Ruthless
card.text: Menace Betray (When this permanent enters, you may sacrifice another permanent that shares a color with it.) When Kav'set betrays a creature, he deals X damage to each opponent, where X is half the betrayed creature's power rounded up. Then put X +1/+1 counters on him.

card.name: Assembling the Menagerie
card.text: When this enters, and at the beginning of your upkeep, put a corral counter on this enchantment. Once each turn, you may pay {0} rather than pay the mana cost for a creature spell you cast with mana value X or less, where X is the number of corral counters on this enchantment.

card.name: Pandevotional Summoner
card.text: Ward {1} {T}: Create a 1/1 Elemental creature token that's all colors.

card.name: Council's Decree
card.text: Kicker {1} Choose one. If this spell was kicked, you may choose both. — • Tap all creatures target opponent controls. • Untap all creatures you control.

card.name: Done // Perfection
card.text:
Create two 1/1 black and blue Insect creature tokens with flying and deathtouch.
---
Aftermath Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Embalmed Dragon
card.text: Ward—Pay 2 life Flying Whenever a player sacrifices a nonland permanent, this creature deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: Samut, Expedition Leader
card.text: Creatures you control have haste and vigilance. {2}{R}: Target creature you control gains double strike until end of turn.

card.name: Katilda's Crucible
card.text: When this enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, create a tapped token that's a copy of target land.

card.name: Zahur, Maahestet Leader
card.text: Whenever a nontoken creature you control dies, you may return a creature card with lesser mana value from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped. Then if the returned creature is a Cat, untap it. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Scattered // The Winds
card.text:
Counter target spell. Up to one target creature attacks or blocks this turn if able.
---
Aftermath (Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.) Create a 3/3 red Phoenix creature token with flying.

card.name: Great Serpent's Arrival
card.text: Whenever this permanent deals combat damage to an opponent, that player loses the game. Sacrifice a creature: This enchantment becomes a 3/5 Snake creature in addition to its other types until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Djeru, Lord General
card.text: Vigilance Other creatures you control get +1/+1.

card.name: Dejukhab Bull
card.text: Flying {G}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Target opponent creates a tapped Treasure token. {W}: Return this creature to its owner's hand. Target opponent scries 2.

card.name: Lazoskin Tracker
card.text: When this creature enters, surveil 2.

card.name: Tomb Builder
card.text: {1}: This creature becomes the color of your choice in addition to its other colors until end of turn. When this creature enters or dies, exile target opponent's graveyard.

card.name: Grounds Guardian
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, untap this creature. This triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Private Feast
card.text: When this artifact enters, put a +1/+1 counter on up to one creature you control. {5}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Exile target creature.

card.name: Gleaming Capstone
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. {1}: This permanent becomes a land with the Oasis subtype (It loses all other card types).

card.name: Blood of the Pious
card.text: The first time each turn you sacrifice a creature, create a Treasure token.

card.name: Memorial Obelisk
card.text: Defender, reach When this creature enters, if you sacrificed a permanent this turn, create an artifact Talisman token that's all colors with "When this artifact is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, you scry 1."

card.name: Winding River
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for an Oasis land card, reveal it and put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Lake Sebay
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control another Oasis. When this land enters, scry 1. {T}: Add {W}. {1}, {T}: Add {U} or {B}.

card.name: Port Kharteru
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control another Oasis. When this land enters, scry 1. {T}: Add {U}. {1}, {T}: Add {W} or {G}.

card.name: Hidden Necropolis Entrance
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control another Oasis. When this land enters, scry 1. {T}: Add {B}. {1}, {T}: Add {R} or {G}.

card.name: Sulfurous Baths
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control another Oasis. When this land enters, scry 1. {T}: Add {R}. {1}, {T}: Add {U} or {B}.

card.name: Shefet Shrublands
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control another Oasis. When this land enters, scry 1. {T}: Add {G}. {1}, {T}: Add {W} or {R}.

card.name: Happy // Help
card.text:
Shuffle any number of cards from your hand into your library, then draw that many cards plus one.
---
Aftermath Create a token that's a copy of target nonland permanent you control with mana value 2 or less.

card.name: Wasmawt's Presence
card.text: Whenever a creature you control enters, target opponent loses life equal to the difference between that creature's power and its toughness.

card.name: Churning of Lava
card.text: Lands you control have "{1}, {T}: This land deals 1 damage to each opponent."

card.name: Going // Great Lengths
card.text:
Destroy all artifacts and enchantments.
---
Aftermath Put two +1/+1 counters on each creature and land you control. Lands you control become 0/0 creatures in addition to their other types until end of turn.

card.name: Vital Takeover
card.text: Enchant land Enchanted land is a 0/1 Elemental creature that's all colors, and has indestructible, defender, and "{T}: Add two mana of any one color." It's still a land.

card.name: Naktamun Market Streets
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. If you control four or more Oasis lands, you may add one mana of any color instead. {8}, {T}: Scry 2, then draw a card. You gain 2 life. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each Oasis you control.

card.name: Foreboding Gate
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Pay 1 life: Add one mana of any color. Activate only if you control another Oasis. {6}, {T}: Search your library for a card, put that card into your hand, then shuffle. Activate only if you control 4 or more Oasis permanents.

card.name: Darux, Miasma of Passion
card.text: Flying When Darux dies, if an opponent lost life this turn, you may put him on top of your library. Whenever an opponent attacks, that player loses 1 life for each untapped creature they control that didn't enter this turn.

card.name: Gah-Api, Life's Hope
card.text: Haste, indestructible, trample Gah-Api can't attack or block unless you've activated an ability of a creature this turn. The first time each turn you attack with one or more creatures, untap up to that many lands you control. {12}{R}{G}: Creatures you control get +6/+6 and gain trample until end of turn.

card.name: Ghrin-Danu, Watchful Mother
card.text: Lifelink When Ghrin-Danu dies, if a land entered under your control this turn, you may return her to her owner's hand. You may play an additional land on each of your turns.

card.name: Hazoret, Zealous Survivor
card.text: Haste, indestructible, menace Hazoret can't attack or block unless you've cast a non-God creature spell this turn. Warrior spells you cast can't be countered. Warriors you control have ward {2}.

card.name: Ketramose, Virtuous Sacrifice
card.text: Indestructible Ketramose can't attack or block unless a creature died this turn. Once during each of your turns, you may cast a creature spell from your graveyard.

card.name: Sab-Sunen, Flow of Time
card.text: Indestructible, reach, trample, vigilance Sab-Sunen can't attack or block unless one or more counters were put on or removed from a permanent this turn. At the beginning of each of your postcombat main phases, there is an additional beginning phase after this phase. (The beginning phase includes the untap, upkeep, and draw steps.)

card.name: Scarab God, Wrath of Eons
card.text: Menace, indestructible Scarab God can't attack or block unless you control a Zombie. At the beginning of your end step, target player sacrifices a creature. Create a token that's a copy of it, except it's a 2/2 black Zombie.

card.name: Maathep, Lawgiver
card.text: Flying, indestructible, vigilance Maathep can't attack or block unless two or more creatures you don't control became tapped this turn. At the beginning of combat on your turn, tap up to one target creature you don't control and untap up to one target creature you control.

card.name: Snehem, God of Locusts
card.text: Indestructible Snehem can't attack or block unless you've drawn two or more cards this turn. Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, you may pay {UR}. When you do, draw a card and create a 1/1 blue and red Insect creature token with flying.

card.name: Wasmawt, Inevitable Death
card.text: Indestructible, deathtouch Wasmawt can't attack or block unless you control another creature with toughness greater than its power. Whenever a creature dies, untap target creature you control and put a +1/+1 counter on it. This triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Feast on Flesh
card.text: Target creature you don't control gets -3/-3 until end of turn. If you control a Zombie, put a +1/+1 counter on a creature you control.

card.name: Coming Forth by Night
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if it targets a card that was put into a graveyard from anywhere this turn. Put target artifact, creature, or planeswalker card from a graveyard onto the battlefield under your control.

card.name: Adjust to Abundance
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay {2} or remove a counter from a permanent you control. Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control.

card.name: Lazotep Blade
card.text: Hexproof Equipped creature gets +2/+2. Whenever equipped creature attacks, it gains ward {2} until your next turn. Equip {2}

card.name: Icon of Unity
card.text: Spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. Whenever you cast a spell that's one or more colors, note those colors. If you haven't noted those colors this turn, you gain 1 life for each of those colors.

card.name: Spellfire Khopesh
card.text: Equipped creature has first strike and prowess. Equip {2}

card.name: Daruxian Spinescourger
card.text: Flying, haste, first strike

card.name: Mindstab Ravager
card.text: Menace When this creature enters, each opponent discards a card.

card.name: Vile Judge
card.text: When this creature enters the battlefield, destroy target creature you don't control. You gain X life and each opponent loses X life, where X is that creature's power.

card.name: Boiling Bloodlust
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, choose one — • Whenever a creature enters under your control this turn, if an opponent lost life this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on it. • Noncreature spells you cast cost {1} less to cast this turn as long as an opponent lost life this turn.

card.name: Chamber of New Anointment
card.text: Whenever you betray a permanent, you gain 2 life. Then if that permanent was a creature, put a charge counter on this artifact. {2}{W}{B}, {T}, Remove X charge counters from this artifact: Return target creature card with mana value less than or equal to X plus 2 from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Divine Attunement
card.text: When this enchantment enters, surveil 2. Spells you cast from anywhere other than your hand cost {1} less to cast. The first time each turn you cast a spell with Aftermath, this enchantment deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: First Altar of Wasmawt
card.text: Whenever a creature with toughness greater than its power enters under your control, you may draw a card and lose 1 life. Do this only once each turn. {2}{B}{G}, {T}, Sacrifice a creature you control: Target opponent loses X life and you gain X life, where X is the sacrificed creature's toughness.

card.name: Mistress of Leashes
card.text: Haste Whenever you attack, untap a land you control. {1}{R}{G}: Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Officiant of the Arisen
card.text: Zombies you control get +1/+1 and have ward {1}. When this creature dies, if it isn't a Zombie, return it to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control. It becomes a Zombie in addition to its other creature types.

card.name: Scion of New Rivers
card.text: At the beginning of your first main phase, remove all counters from this creature. If no counters were removed this way, put two +1/+1 counters on it. Otherwise, add two mana of any one color.

card.name: Maathep's Servant
Training Regimen
card.text: When this enchantment enters, create a 1/1 red and white Warrior creature token. Warriors you control have haste and vigilance.

card.name: Walking Oasis
card.text: When this creature enters, search your library for up to one land card, reveal it and put it into your hand, then shuffle. Whenever a land enters under your control, if you don't control another land with the same name, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Bastion of Maathep
card.text: Whenever you tap an untapped creature you don't control, you may put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. {2}{WU}: Tap target nonland permanent you don't control.

card.name: Crucible of Eternity
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if a creature card was put into a graveyard from anywhere this turn, create a 1/1 black Zombie creature token. {2}{U}, Sacrifice a permanent: Draw a card. Activate only once each turn, and only as a sorcery.

card.name: Bloodblade Naga
card.text: Menace Whenever you attack, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Priest of Gah-Api
card.text: Activated abilities of other permanents you control cost {1} less to activate.This effect can't reduce the mana in that cost to less than one mana. {2}{R}: This creature deals 1 damage to any target. Activate only once each turn as a sorcery, and only if you've attacked this turn.

card.name: Voyage to New Homes
card.text: You may play an additional land on each of your turns as long as it doesn't share a name with a land you control. When you do, you gain 1 life.

card.name: High Priest of Ketramose
card.text: Betray (When this permanent enters, you may sacrifice another permanent that shares a color with it.) When this creature betrays another permanent, you may draw a card and lose 1 life. At the beginning of your end step, if a creature died this turn, create a 1/1 black and white Cat creature token.

card.name: Tjuf, Herald of Snehem
card.text: Flying Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, target creature you control gets +1/+1 until end of turn. If that spell was cast from a graveyard and had Aftermath, creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn instead.

card.name: Hofan Slithermaster
card.text: Other creatures you control get +0/+1. At the beginning of your end step, you may pay {1}{BG}. If you do, create a 1/1 green and black Snake creature token.

card.name: Chariot Commander
card.text: First strike Warrior spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. Whenever you attack, if another Warrior is attacking, you may scry 1.

card.name: Gentle and Raging
card.text: Permanents you control with counters on them have trample, ward {1}, and "{T}: Add one mana of any color." {1}{G}: Put a +1/+1 counter on target permanent. Activate only once each turn, and only as a sorcery.

card.name: Human Warrior ASM
card.text: First strike

card.name: Angel ASM
card.text: Flying

card.name: Elemental Cat ASM
card.text: Haste

card.name: Warrior ASM
card.text: Haste

card.name: Talisman ASM
card.text: When this artifact is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, you scry 1.

card.name: Bird ASM
card.text: Flying

card.name: Treasure ASM
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Insect ASM
card.text: Flying, deathtouch

card.name: Plant Wall ASM
card.text: Defender {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Mirage Pool
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control another Oasis. When this land enters, scry 1, then choose a color. {T}: Add {C}. {1}, {T}: Add one mana of the chosen color.

card.name: Noble's Treasury
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {1}, {T}: Create an artifact Talisman token that's all colors with "When this artifact is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, you scry 1."

card.name: Zombie Bird ASM
card.text: Flying

card.name: Phoenix ASM
card.text: Flying

card.name: Insect ASM
card.text: Flying
